title: Let Them Cook
description: In this world of sentient vegetables, it is eat or be eaten. Fight for your allies, fight for your friends, and most importantly... Fight for your survival.

title: Motion Master Masquerade
description: Pose, catch, and match. Join the circus. NOW!

title: Shooty Gang
description: Shooty tooty, these little guys are more than just fruity!

title: Just Pose
description: Pose for me Baby! Make it look GOOD!
